data.label: vivo Push
data.description: vivo 推送（即 vpush）是 vivo 公司向开发者提供的消息推送服务，通过在云端与客户端之间建立一条稳定、可靠的长连接，为开发者提供向客户端应用实时推送消息的服务，支持百亿级的通知/消息推送，秒级触达移动用户。

data.label: vivo Push
data.description: vivo Push (i.e., vPush) is a message push service provided by vivo for developers. By establishing a stable and reliable long connection between the cloud and client devices, it enables developers to deliver real-time messages to client applications, supporting 10-billion-level notification and message pushes with second-level delivery to mobile users.
